description:
Analyze the active or specified Lua GC monitor session for allocation hotspots, sustained GC debt, leak risk, and phase anomalies. Use after Play Mode recording (built-in Lua GC panel or lua_gc_monitor_start). Returns rule-based alerts, tuning suggestions, and a short tail of recent samples. Pair with knowledge/skill/gc.md for static optimization patterns.
- When Headroom is enabled and output exceeds the compress threshold, large results are compressed through headroom-ai (requires headroom proxy or HEADROOM_API_KEY).

sessionId.description: Optional session id. Defaults to the active monitor session for the current Unity project.

maxSamplePoints.description: Maximum recent samples to include in the summary payload (default 50, max 500).
